Lect. Dr. Kamal Alalı was born in 1984 in Aleppo, Syria. He completed his undergraduate studies at the University of Aleppo, Faculty of Arts, Department of Arabic Language and Literature. He subsequently earned his Master’s degree in Teaching Arabic from the Higher Institute of Languages, University of Aleppo.

Alalı began his professional career as an educator in Aleppo, gaining pedagogical experience across various secondary education institutions. Upon moving to Istanbul, he continued his work in the field of Arabic language instruction at Beykoz Imam Hatip High School and various private educational institutions.

Since 2014, Alalı has been serving as a Lecturer in the Arabic Preparatory Program at the School of Foreign Languages, Istanbul 29 Mayıs University.
